name: construction contractors processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 timesheets/month, inefficient payroll processing causes late payments. We compile timesheets and prepare payroll input files instead of manual timesheet compilation and payroll input preparation.
problem_solved: Inefficient payroll processing leading to delays in payments.
